storyboard.content: My right shoulder has been aching and feeling stiff for the past 2 months.
I cannot reach overhead or behind my back without pain.
My range of motion in that shoulder feels limited compared to normal.
This started 2 months ago right after I had a minor fall, and it has been going on since then.
The pain is dull and achy, not sharp. I can still use my arm but certain movements hurt.
I am a 55-year-old woman and I am otherwise healthy.
The pain is worse with specific movements like reaching up or back, but is manageable at rest.
